LOUP NOIR 
LYRICS

Les sourires et les faux semblants 
Et quelques gouttes ont suffit 
A l‚Äô√©lixir pour √™tre mortel

J‚Äôai fait 100 000 avant le mis-per  

J‚Äôm‚Äôentra√Æne √Ý sourire devant la glace 
J‚Äôm‚Äôentra√Æne √Ý souffrir sans rem√®de 
Le petite maison est en ruine 
Quand la faim pense, 
le coeur est en gr√®ve 
La vie c‚Äôest mener les bons choix 
L‚Äôimage vient sans m√™me une esquisse 
Dans le dos les schlass traversent la redskins
La trahison des gens qu‚Äôon estime 
J‚Äôai pas vu p√®re fermer les paupi√®res 
T√™te dans le guidon c‚Äô√©tait le frigo 
Une chienne de vie √Ý se lever aux aurores 
J‚Äôaurai jamais su comment faire 
J‚Äôaurai jamais su comment perdre 
Avec la haine de ceux qu‚Äôon enferme  

Et quand les yeux se ferment et que tout est noir 
Quand les mots se perdent 
Tu veux  tuer un homme 
Prend du Sky et des faux espoirs 
Et quand les m√¥mes se perdent 
Dans les sinueux couloirs des enfers 
On sera de retour 2 minutes avant 
Que les revolvers leur jouent du tonnerre 
L‚Äôorage est parti o√π est le soleil 
Mon deuil n‚Äôest pas fait o√π est mon sommeil¬Ý

J‚Äôparle de vraies choses qu‚Äôon vit ici 
De vrais flingues qu‚Äôon a tenu
D‚Äôun vrai sang qui s‚Äôest vers√©
De la seule femme qui m‚Äôa berc√© 
De vrais potes qu‚Äôon a perdus 

Des pens√©es noires et des nuits blanches 
Des armes des enfants terribles 
Le b√©ton le bruit du ciment 
L√Ý o√π on veut pas finir int√©rim 
Des gens m‚Äôont trahi j‚Äôai la naus√©e 
J‚Äôd√©pose un flingue et quelques roses 
Sur le verso d‚Äôun livre us√© 
√ânum√©rer ce que j‚Äôy ai laiss√© 
Prendre un maximum pour papa 
Comme si j‚Äôallais le faire rena√Ætre 
D‚Äôentre les morts comme un Dieu grec 
Tous les bleus que j‚Äôai autour du coeur 
Tous ces billets froiss√©s dans mon sac 
Trop jeune pour embrasser le plomb 
Mais trop jeune pour vivre tout √ßa 
Des borsalino dans la nuit 
Des portes flingues tournent dans la ville 
Du sang √Ý √©ponger dans la cuisine 
Des billets qui flottent dans la piscine 
Little Italy Corleone sous Michael 
Marie Curie dans la compteuse
L√Ý o√π le ventre est le prompteur

snippet.description:

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

#DuaLipa‚Äã #FutureNostalgia‚Äã #Grammys

snippet.description:

If you suspect that you or a loved one has been the victim of fraud, you can call or visit the National Elder Fraud hotline (https://stopelderfraud.ovc.ojp.gov/)  at 833-372-8311 and report it to the FTC by visiting the agency‚Äôs website (https://reportfraud.ftc.gov/#/) or calling 877-382-4357.

snippet.title: Kosso & Dorentina | Wintersessie 2021 | 101Barz
snippet.description:
Kosso & Dorentina kwamen vorig jaar als eerste koppel de 101Barz studio blessen en hadden de best bekeken sessie van 2020. Vandaag zijn ze weer bij Rotjoch in de booth om het nog eens dunnetjes over te doen. Lees verder op: https://www.bnnvara.nl/101barz/artikelen/kosso-dorentina-pakken-door

#KOSSO #DORENTINA #WINTERSESSIE #101BARZ

Mixed & Mastered by Rawbeem

101Barz is het grootste hiphop-platform van Nederland met wekelijks nieuwe video's. Natuurlijk brengt Rotjoch elke week de welbekende studiosessies op je beeldscherm, maar dat is niet alles. We gaan langs bij producers en zien hoe zij een beat maken voor de beginnende artiesten thuis in de serie 'BPM'. We zoeken talenten op in hun eigen buurt om ze beter te leren kennen in 'Talent vd Maand'. Ben je op zoek naar wat langere interviews? Dan is 'Ins & Outs' iets voor jou!

Volg ons ook op:
üî¥ Website: https://101barz.nl
üåê Twitter: https://twitter.com/101barz 
üîµ Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/101BarzOfficieel
üü§ Instagram: https://instagram.com/101barznl

Wil jij de redactie iets mailen? Stuur het naar info@101Barz.nl

101Barz is een online platform van BNNVARA, onderdeel van de Nederlandse Publieke Omroep.

Locatie: Le Ch√¢teau (https://www.le-chateau.ro)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Versuri:

Esti o bucata cazuta din rai,
Esti o minune, doar tu poti sa-mi dai, 
Din lumea ta o parte,
Sapte zile din sapte.
Rochie alba, sangria-n pahar,
Gura ta dulce ispita mi-e iar.
Ochii diamante,
Tu ma ghidezi in noapte.

Ia-ma-n brate flamande,
Lipeste ma de inima ta.
Fericire-n secunde,
Opreste timpul, nu mai pleca.

Refren:

Cand nori pe cerul vietii se aduna, hoooo,
Ma las in grija ta,
Jumatatea mea mai buna.
Si-n noptile reci cu luna plina, heeei, 
Ma-mbraci cu dragostea,
Jumatatea mea mai buna.

Am lasat in urma noastra orasul gol.
Ne-am inchis in lumea noastra in dormitor,
Siluete la fereastra intr-un dans nocturn,
Tu esti noaptea mea albastra,
Esti tot ce am mai bun.

Ia-ma-n brate flamande 
Lipeste ma de inima ta
Fericire-n secunde
Opreste timpul, nu mai pleca.

Refren:

Cand nori pe cerul vietii se aduna, hoooo,
Ma las in grija ta,
Jumatatea mea mai buna.
Si-n noptile reci cu luna plina, heeei, 
Ma-mbraci cu dragostea,
Jumatatea mea mai buna.

Inima la tine imi zboara,
Cand nu esti ard ca o tigara.
Mai bine stinge-ma cu un sarut.

Inima la tine imi zboara,
Cand nu esti ard ca o tigara.
Mai bine stinge-ma cu un sarut.

Jumatatea mea mai buna.

snippet.title: Joe Biden stumbles on steps of Air Force One
snippet.description: The US president stumbled while boarding Air Force One on his way to visit to Atlanta, Georgia, to meet with Asian American community leaders. Biden tripped on the steps up to the plane, before recovering and carrying on unaided, turning to salute at the top. The 78-year-old fractured his right foot in November 2020 while playing with his dog Major

snippet.title: La guerre en Ukraine

snippet.title: BOEF - QUARANTAINE SESSIE #3 (PROD. KEYSER SOZE)
snippet.description:
Stream 'Quarantaine Sessie #3': https://boefmusic.lnk.to/QS3

CREDITS

Muziek
Uitvoering: Boef
Tekst: Sofiane Boussaadia
Muziek: Keyser Soze

Video
Regie: Teemong
Camera: Jim Stuurman & Teemong
Edit: Teemong

Lyrics
Alles voor de money, maar de fam die gaat first
Vlieg ik op vakantie, hele fam die gaat first
Weer een 100k, die ik beleg op de beurs
Toto dat is niks, had weer pech, fok de Spurs
Ik woon in een zieke huis, maar ik mis alleen een nurse
Ik moest stelen uit een purse, en nu pay jij voor een verse
Jij bent vervelend maar ik worse
Wordt gebeld ‚Äòsta voor de deur, je spreekt met je chauffeur‚Äô
Ey, alles voor de kleur, want de kleur geeft me alles neef
Rappers krijgen pakkies, niet denken dat ik ze cadeaus geef
Wil jij geld maken, TMC, wordt een abonnee
Domme jongens die zeggen tegen die abo nee
En hij lacht mee, maar zou jou tot je graaf naaien
Jij ging niet op je doel, maar een afzwaaier
Pak je flappen, gaan ze plakken als een bladzijde
Ik lees de krant niet, weet niet wat ze in dat blad zeiden
Op der knie√´n, ze zegt A, maar is me Bae niet
Zij wilt praten over baby‚Äôs, beter niet, ze maakt me C-ziek (zeeziek)
Praatjes maar je Deed niet, ik zweer het jij bent geen G
Geef geen F, Ha - Ha - Ha zet die puntjes op de I
En ze kennen RATATA, helemaal tot overseas
Elke album platina, is dit waar, geloof het niet
Dit is leip, maar verdien, want ik vocht broeder
Stuur geen brief naar je vriend, ga hem opzoeken
Today mislukt, dan moet je het laten lukken morgen
Ik ben een soldier, never ever heb ik teruggetrokken
Maar zou hij trekken, wollah teh had hem teruggetrokken
We runde hokken, en voor de rechter kunnen jokken
Niet geobserveerd en dan kun je gokken
Vraag niet naar der naam, vraag der kun je sokken?
Dit is leip, maar verdiend, want ik vocht broeder
Nu ga ik kwijt, terwijl de popo mij al zocht vroeger
Vele rappers zijn me kids, ik moet ze opvoeden
Zeg me moker level hoger, je moet opschroeven
Sla de spijker op ze kop, en wees op schroeven
Of op boeken maar, school was nooit echt mijn ding
Ik had neppe schoenen, wou een echt paar zonder scheiding
Ze begonnen me te boeken en dat voelde als bevrijding
Fok die zuen, duivel brengt me in verleiding
Ik moet even richting styling, want heb zometeen een clipshoot
Gezicht is al verbrand, ik kan dit echt niet meer voor niks doen
Ik kwam in de krant, brakka‚Äôs voelde als een plicht toen
BOEF in koeienletters, ga maar vragen aan een hindoe
Je chick wil stoeien met me, weet niet wat ik met die hint doe
Omringen met de juiste mensen, brada is wat ik doe
Ik kom van de bodem, ben nu paid, we kunnen sick doen
Haar een beetje korter, maar wat zal ik met me sik doen?
We braken deuren open, nu kun jij ze niet meer dichtdoen, Boef

BOEF
https://www.instagram.com/boef/‚Äã

¬©Ô∏è 2021 BOEFMUSIC distributed by Sony Music Entertainment Netherlands B.V.

snippet.title: Fast fashion - Les dessous de la mode √Ý bas prix | ARTE
snippet.description:
En quelques d√©cennies, la "fast fashion", ou mode jetable, a r√©volutionn√© l‚Äôindustrie textile √Ý bas prix. Enqu√™te sur l'impact social et le co√ªt environnemental d'un secteur qui ne conna√Æt pas la crise.

Renouveler en permanence sa garde-robe sans se ruiner : rien de plus simple aujourd‚Äôhui. Tandis que les marques qui font le pari de vendre exclusivement en ligne se multiplient, l‚Äôachat de v√™tements tient d√©sormais pour beaucoup d‚Äôentre nous du loisir √Ý part enti√®re. Une tendance entretenue par les nouveaux acteurs de la fast fashion sur les r√©seaux sociaux qui, via un marketing subtil, r√©mun√®rent les influenceurs pour placer leurs produits. Ces derni√®res ann√©es, des marques d‚Äôultra fast fashion se sont m√™me lanc√© le d√©fi de produire et de livrer encore plus vite et moins cher que les vendeurs traditionnels. Mais leur efficacit√© se paie au prix fort. En Grande-Bretagne, ces v√™tements sont fabriqu√©s dans des ateliers insalubres par des ouvriers pay√©s la moiti√© du salaire minimum. Au-del√Ý de son impact social, la fast fashion, deuxi√®me industrie la plus polluante au monde, a aussi un co√ªt environnemental. M√™me quand ce mod√®le industriel promet de s‚Äôamender en proposant une mode plus durable, sa facture √©cologique reste lourde.

Tragique constat
Alors que 56 millions de tonnes de v√™tements sont vendues chaque ann√©e dans le monde, les journalistes d‚Äôinvestigation Gilles Bovon (Starbucks sans filtre) et √âdouard Perrin ont enqu√™t√© sur l‚Äôimpact social, environnemental et sanitaire de ce secteur en plein boom.¬ÝEn Europe, aux √âtats-Unis et en Inde, ils ont rencontr√© des acteurs du secteur ¬Ý‚àí anthropologue, professeur d‚Äô√©conomie, chercheur en neuromarketing‚Ä¶ ‚àí et se sont infiltr√©s au c≈ìur de l‚Äôindustrie textile. Au Royaume-Uni, ils ont pu filmer des ateliers de fabrication ill√©gaux et interviewer des personnes qui ont c√¥toy√© de pr√®s la fast fashion (ex-styliste, influenceuse mode, ancien associ√© du fondateur de Zara...). Riche de t√©moignages, leur film dresse le bilan trop peu √©coresponsable d‚Äôune industrie qui brasse des milliards.

Fast fashion - Les dessous de la mode √Ý bas prix
Documentaire d'Edouard Perrin et Gilles Bovon (France, 2020, 1h32mn)

snippet.title: Kasteel Hoensbroek | De Drop #3
snippet.description:
Een hele nacht alleen in Kasteel Hoensbroek, op zoek naar bewijs voor het bestaan van 'De Blauwe Dame'? 

Giel, Thomas of Stefan moeten ALLEEN de hele nacht op de engste plekken van Nederland verblijven. Wie het wordt, bepaalt het lot!
#stuktv #dedrop

DISCLAIMER
Tijdens de opnames van deze aflevering was de avondklok nog niet ingevoerd. Giel, Thomas, Stefan en de crew zijn voor aanvang van de opnames negatief getest op Corona.

Ou du moins une mise en sc√®ne,  tout a √©t√© arrang√© ; il s‚Äôagit de plusieurs iguanes que la magie du montage fait passer pour un unique h√©ros.
Beaucoup ont alors d√©couvert une des face cach√©e des documentaires animaliers : Aujourd'hui je vous emm√®ne dans leur coulisses, avec des histoires terrifiantes.

A la demande de son fils, pr√©cision : C‚Äôest Christian Moullec qui a √©t√© le premier en France √Ý utiliser les techniques d‚Äôimpr√©gnations de Lorenz, c‚Äôest lui que Jacque Perrin a contact√© pour faire son film le peuple migrateur. Jacque Perrin -n'a selon lui et apr√®s v√©rification √ßa semble vraisemblable- pas impr√©gn√© d'oiseau pour faire son film, il a utilis√© ceux de Christian Moullec.

snippet.title: LIVE: GRAMMY Awards Premiere Ceremony | March 14 at 3pm ET / 12pm PT
snippet.description:
Music‚Äôs Biggest Night kicks off with the Premiere Ceremony, featuring 8 special performances and more than 70 GRAMMYs awarded across music genres ranging from classical and jazz to R&B, Global music and more. 

Hosted by current three-time GRAMMY nominee Jhen√© Aiko, the Premiere Ceremony will feature a number of performances by current GRAMMY nominees, including: Nigerian singer, songwriter and rapper Burna Boy, jazz band Terri Lyne Carrington + Social Science, blues musician Jimmy "Duck" Holmes, classical pianist Igor Levit, Latin electropop musician Lido Pimienta, singer, songwriter and performance artist Poppy, and singer, songwriter and composer Rufus Wainwright. 

Kicking off the event will be a tribute performance celebrating the 50th anniversary of the classic Marvin Gaye track "Mercy, Mercy Me (The Ecology)". The special all-nominee ensemble performance will feature Afro-Peruvian Jazz Orchestra, Thana Alexa, John Beasley, Camilo, Regina Carter, Alexandre Desplat, Bebel Gilberto, Lupita Infante, Sarah Jarosz, Mykal Kilgore, Ledisi, Mariachi Sol de Mexico de Jose Hernandez, PJ Morton, Gregory Porter, Grace Potter, s√§je, Gustavo Santaolalla (Bajofondo), Anoushka Shankar, and Kamasi Washington. 

All of the Premiere Ceremony performers and the host are nominated this year, as are most of the presenters. Afro-Peruvian Jazz Orchestra for Best Latin Jazz Album (Tradiciones); Aiko for Album Of The Year (Chilombo), Best R&B Performance ("Lightning & Thunder" featuring John Legend) and Best Progressive R&B Album (Chilombo); Alexa for Best Jazz Vocal Album (Ona); Beasley with Somi With Frankfurt Radio Big Band for Best Jazz Vocal Album (Holy Room: Live At Alte Oper), Best Large Jazz Ensemble Album (MONK'estra Plays John Beasley), Best Arrangement, Instrumental or A Cappella ("Donna Lee") and Best Arrangement, Instrumentals and Vocals ("Asas Fechadas" with Maria Mendes); Burna Boy for Best Global Music Album (Twice As Tall); Burr for Best Comedy Album (Paper Tiger); Camilo for Best Latin Pop or Urban Album (Por Primera Vez); Carrington + Social Science for Best Jazz Instrumental Album (Waiting Game); Carter for Best Improvised Jazz Solo ("Pachamama"); Chika for Best New Artist; Desplat for Best Instrumental Composition ("Plumfield"); Gilberto for Best Global Music Album (Agora); Holmes for Best Traditional Blues Album (Cypress Grove); Infante for Best Regional Mexican Music Album (Including Tejano) (La Serenata); Jarosz for Best American Roots Song ("Hometown"), Best Americana Album (World On The Ground); Kilgore for Best Traditional R&B Performance ("Let Me Go"); Ledisi for Best Traditional R&B Performance ("Anything For You"); Levit for Best Classical Instrumental Solo (Beethoven: Complete Piano Sonatas); Mariachi Sol de Mexico de Jose Hernandez for Best Regional Mexican Music Album (Including Tejano) (Bailando Sones Y Huapangos Con Mariachi Sol De Mexico De Jose Hernandez); Morton for Best Gospel Album (Gospel According To PJ); Pimienta for Best Latin Rock or Alternative Album (Miss Colombia); Poppy for Best Metal Performance ("BLOODMONEY"); Porter for Best R&B Album (All Rise); Potter for Best Rock Performance ("Daylight"), Best Rock Album (Daylight); s√§je for Best Arrangement, Instruments and Vocals ("Desert Song"); Santaolalla with Bajofondo for Best Latin Rock or Alternative Album (Aura); Shankar for Best Global Music Album (Love Letters); Wainwright for Best Traditional Pop Vocal Album (Unfollow The Rules); and Washington for Best Score Soundtrack For Visual Media (Becoming).

Texte :

La lune est pleine.
Il est midi 20.
Dans les rues d√©ferlent
Ces foules de d√©bris divins.
Besoin d‚Äô√™tre fou
Pour pas finir dingue.
Juste un peu plus fou...
J‚Äôvois les saisons passer.
J‚Äôme fais discret pour ne pas qu‚Äôelles me touchent.
Je vois des gens cass√©s.
Le bruit que fait leurs vieilles √¢mes le prouve.
√áa fait semblant d‚Äôaller
Mais dans leurs dos courb√©s ils ont tous
Des fl√®ches enflamm√©es.
Dans ces gigantesques cimeti√®res vivants,
Je sais que trois quarts des gens ne seront pas pour.
M√™me si je ne m‚Äôadresse qu‚Äô√Ý des statues qui parlent.
M√™me si des centaines d‚Äôentre elles m‚Äôfont la cour.
M√™me si je sais que chaque minute qui passe
Me rapproche de ce jour o√π ils s‚Äôen prendront √Ý nous.
M√™me si j‚Äôsuis moi-m√™me qu‚Äôune statue qui parle.
J‚Äô√©cris des chansons d‚Äôamour.

J‚Äô√©cris des chansons d‚Äôamour,

snippet.title: DIKKE | Wintersessie 2021 | 101Barz
snippet.description:
L-Season! DIKKE z'n EP '130 Kilo' wist eerder dit jaar de Belgische hitlijsten te domineren en vandaag is hij bij Rotjoch in de studio om je barz te brengen. Lees verder op: https://www.bnnvara.nl/101barz/artikelen/dikke-gaat-de-grens-over

#DIKKE #WINTERSESSIE #101BARZ

Mixed & Mastered by Rawbeem

101Barz is het grootste hiphop-platform van Nederland met wekelijks nieuwe video's. Natuurlijk brengt Rotjoch elke week de welbekende studiosessies op je beeldscherm, maar dat is niet alles. We gaan langs bij producers en zien hoe zij een beat maken voor de beginnende artiesten thuis in de serie 'BPM'. We zoeken talenten op in hun eigen buurt om ze beter te leren kennen in 'Talent vd Maand'. Ben je op zoek naar wat langere interviews? Dan is 'Ins & Outs' iets voor jou!

Volg ons ook op:
üî¥ Website: https://101barz.nl
üåê Twitter: https://twitter.com/101barz 
üîµ Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/101BarzOfficieel

snippet.title: CBC News: The National | Meghan and Harry‚Äôs Oprah interview; Vaccine optimism | March 7, 2021
snippet.description:
Prince Harry and Meghan sit down with Oprah for a revealing interview about leaving their roles as senior royals. The reasons to be optimistic about the vaccine rollout and the road ahead. Plus, the officer charged with killing George Floyd goes on trial. 

#HarryandMeghan
#COVID19
#GeorgeFloyd

00:00 The National for March 7, 2021
01:06 Harry and Meghan's Oprah interview
06:32 Multiple donors for same WE Charity project
09:28 Vaccines won‚Äôt be end of masks, distancing,
11:36 Canada's COVID-19 vaccine rollout 
12:14 Ontario pharmacies vaccine pilot project 
14:19 Easing COVID-19 restrictions 
14:41 Rally for return of youth sports in Quebec 
16:51 Questions about DHL 'hidden fees'
19:16 Violence continue to escalate in Myanmar
19:40 Pope preaches peace during Iraq visit 
22:55 George Floyd murder trial 
27:46 COVID-19 Pandemic: One Year Later 
28:21 What year two of the pandemic might look like
31:19 Helping seniors access COVID-19 vaccines
34:30 Alberta MLA monitored by police
43:30 Shell Alberta to use robotic dogs 
44:03 The Moment: From Prairies to Bollywood

Subscribe to The National: 
https://www.youtube.com/user/CBCTheNational?sub_confirmation=1

Connect with The National online:
Facebook | https://www.facebook.com/thenational
Twitter | https://twitter.com/CBCTheNational
Instagram | https://www.instagram.com/cbcthenational

More from CBC News | https://www.cbc.ca/news

The National is CBC's flagship nightly news program, featuring the day's top stories with in-depth and original journalism, with hosts Adrienne Arsenault and Andrew Chang in Toronto, Ian Hanomansing in Vancouver and the CBC's chief political correspondent, Rosemary Barton in Ottawa.

snippet.title: MILAN KNOL & DUTCH PERFORMANTE STROOIEN MET GELD - GELDROVERS | Gierige Gasten
snippet.description:
Exclusieve auto‚Äôs, helikopters en de duurste huizen √©n kastelen van Nederland. In deze aflevering ervaren de Gierige Gasten eindelijk hoe het is om te zwemmen in het geld. Welk team lukt het om op de foto te gaan met de meest waardevolle spullen? Milan Knol & Chahid Charrak aka Dutch Performante dagen de Gierige Gasten uit voor ‚Ç¨449! #GierigeGasten #Geldrovers #MilanKnol #Knollergang #DutchPerformante

Met dank aan De Fabrique (https://defabrique.nl/).

Minder betalen, meer leven!
Abonneer op ons kanaal voor alle gratis tips: http://bit.ly/subGierigeGasten

Blijf op de hoogte van onze avonturen via:
http://www.instagram.com/gierigegasten

Volg ons ook op Instagram op:
http://www.instagram.com/gierigegasten
http://www.instagram.com/nielsoosthoek
http://www.instagram.com/martijnmanschot
http://www.instagram.com/fitboyjossa

Check ons ook op KIJK: 
http://www.kijk.nl/gierigegasten

Wij, Gierige Gasten, vinden het leven al duur genoeg. Daarom plaatsen wij elke dinsdag op 16:00 uur een nieuwe video waarin wij shit voor weinig of helemaal gratis regelen. En omdat we tegenwoordig geld krijgen van ome John, kunnen we af en toe ook een '√©chte' serie maken, die zie je elke donderdag om 16:00 uur! Noem ons gierig, karig, inhalig, krenterig, hebzuchtig, knijperig of zelfs schraperig. Wij noemen het slim!

snippet.title: 400 km/u in PEPERDURE Nissan?! | Daily Driver | DAY1
snippet.description:
Deze Nissan GTR met rond de 2000pk breekt alle wetten van de natuur!! Vandaag zijn Jay-Jay en Job te gast bij Total Car Concept waar misschien wel de vetste en snelste auto's van ons land staan... Een en al genieten geblazen dus!

Kaarten DAY1 WORLD OF CARS! https://www.day1worldofcars.com 

DAY1 WORLD OF CARS Instagram https://instagram.com/day1worldofcars?igshid=1u62qb1ianqcu

Kijk iedere zaterdag om 11:00 een nieuwe aflevering van DAY1!

Meepraten over deze video? Kom gezellig in onze Discord server!
üî∑Discord: https://discord.gg/StgPaEXC7c

Shop nu jouw favoriete auto parfum of doping-vrije voedingssupplementen hier:
üî∑ XONE: https://xone.nl
üî∑ The Car Parfum: https://www.thecarparfum.com 


Shout-out naar het team achter de schermen:
üî∑ Camera: Thijs Ahsmann - @Thijsahsmann
üî∑ Edit: Dario Ferraro - @Dazzerzz
üî∑ Animatie/design: @studio.stilt
üî∑ Muziek: https://open.spotify.com/user/jayjayboske?si=TGMqi-cJTx63p8srmNw4Pw

Volg ons op Instagram:
üî∑ @day1lifestyle
üî∑ @day1worldofcars
üî∑ @jayjayboske
üî∑ @djlafuente

Check hier onze wekelijkse DAY1 podcast:  
üî∑ Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/19Aoq5eiE0yVwP1nlM5ufc
üî∑ Twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/day1lifestyle 
üî∑ Apple Podcasts: https://podcasts.apple.com/nl/podcast/day1-podcast/id1504234285

Kom jij ook naar h√©t auto event van het jaar?
Koop jouw tickets nu via https://www.day1worldofcars.com

ENJOY, LIKE & SUBSCRIBE! #DAY1 

Elke dag is een nieuwe kans om beter te worden dan dat je gister was, om meer uit het leven te halen en de mensen om je heen te inspireren. DAY1 staat voor de kans die zich iedere dag voordoet om alles uit jouw dag te halen. Hard werken, nooit opgeven en genieten van jouw succes. Vandaag is de dag om te laten zien dat niets onmogelijk is.

snippet.title: Tikkende tijdbom: de volgende mega-aardbeving
snippet.description:
Precies tien jaar geleden kreeg Japan een van de zwaarste aardbevingen ooit over zich heen, met een tsunami en een kernramp erbovenop. De vraag is: waar komt de volgende mega-aardbeving? Want dat die komt, dat is zeker. Leggen we je uit. 

Luister ook naar onze podcast, Lang verhaal kort, in je favoriete podcast-app! Ook op Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/3Ab6DGFJL7VE5ToIH4r6w1?si=DqrwE6L2TvOb99FF1D2d3A

Meer video‚Äôs? Abonneer je op ons kanaal en praat mee! https://bit.ly/2PJk8Xg

Volg NOS op 3 ook op Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nosop3

We bedanken hoogleraar seismologie Arwen Deuss van de Universiteit Utrecht voor haar deskundige feedback op het script. In deze video van de Universiteit van Nederland legt zij uit waarom de wetenschap nog niet zo ver is dat het kan voorspellen wanneer aardbevingen gebeuren: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=q-E5PoOE8Q0 

Muziek:
Noria - 'Seashore'
Rujay - 'Bad Dreams'
Rujay - 'On Ice'

---------------------------------------------------------------

‚óè VRAGEN/TIPS/IDEE√ãN? We horen graag wat jij van het nieuws en onze uitleg vindt, laat je horen in de comments! Of mail ons: nosop3@nos.nl 

‚óè VOLG ONS OOK HIER: Facebook: https://facebook.com/nosop3 Twitter: http://twitter.com/nosop3

___________________________________________________

De NOS is de grootste nieuwsorganisatie van Nederland. Bij NOS op 3 vind je elke zaterdag nieuws dat je niet mag hebben gemist. Wij gaan voor jou op onderzoek uit naar nieuws uit jouw wereld. Ook vind je hier uitleg bij het nieuws.

#Japan #aardbeving

en.title: The next megathrust earthquake, when?
en.description: Exactly ten years ago, Japan suffered one of the worst earthquakes ever, with a tsunami and a nuclear disaster on top. The question is, where will the next mega earthquake be? Because it will come, that's for sure.

---
Each weekday morning, "CBS This Morning" co-hosts Gayle King, Anthony Mason and Tony Dokoupil deliver two hours of original reporting, breaking news and top-level newsmaker interviews in an engaging and informative format that challenges the norm in network morning news programs. The broadcast has earned a prestigious Peabody Award, a Polk Award, four News & Documentary Emmys, three Daytime Emmys and the 2017 Edward R. Murrow Award for Best Newscast. The broadcast was also honored with an Alfred I. duPont-Columbia Award as part of CBS News division-wide coverage of the shootings at Sandy Hook Elementary School in Newtown, Connecticut. Check local listings for "CBS This Morning" broadcast times.

snippet.title: I Hitchhiked the World's Deadliest Train (20hrs across the Sahara)
snippet.description:
Become smarter in 5 minutes by signing up for free today: http://cen.yt/mbyestheory - Thanks to Morning Brew for sponsoring today‚Äôs video.

üôèüèº Thank you for making these videos possible through your support of Seek Discomfort 
‚ö°Ô∏è SEEK DISCOMFORT: http://seek-discomfort.com/yes-theory

The Mauritanian Railway, one of the world's longest and heaviest train in the world transports iron ore from a remote mining town in Mauritania to a coastal city cutting through the Sahara Desert. The ride lasts anywhere between 19-30 hours and a few brave locals use it to travel back and forth with supplies. The dangerous trek leads to several unfortunate deaths every year as people fall off the train. Thomas and his friend Drew Binsky attempt to find this train and embark on the dangerous journey through the Sahara.

Thank you to Drew Binsky for coming with me and guiding me through how to travel in this part of the world! Check out his channel here:
https://www.youtube.com/user/thehungrypartier

Thank you to our local friend Med for some of the b-roll shots of the train.

snippet.title: Les origines de la Grande Muraille de Chine

Dans notre imaginaire collectif, la Grande Muraille de Chine est un immense mur fortifi√© en pierre, d‚Äôun seul tenant sur plusieurs milliers de kilom√®tres, et construit par les Chinois pour se d√©fendre face √Ý des invasions barbares. Et les th√©ories les plus loufoques vont jusqu‚Äô√Ý affirmer qu‚Äôon peut la voir depuis la Lune. M√™me si c‚Äôest faux, √ßa montre quand m√™me bien l‚Äôimportance qu‚Äôon lui donne, et √Ý quel point on la voit comme un ouvrage massif. Dans cette vid√©o on va voir ensemble ce qu‚Äôest en r√©alit√© ce que nous, Occidentaux, appelons la ¬´ Grande Muraille de Chine ¬ª.

Et les th√©ories les plus loufoques vont jusqu‚Äô√Ý affirmer qu‚Äôon peut la voir depuis la Lune. M√™me si c‚Äôest faux, √ßa montre quand m√™me bien l‚Äôimportance qu‚Äôon lui donne, et √Ý quel point on la voit comme un ouvrage massif. snippet.title: Ta Joela verpest Qucee's freestyle | SUPERGAANDE FREESTYLE ft. Donnie
snippet.description:
ABONNEER op Supergaande als je altijd op de hoogte wilt blijven!
https://Supergaande.lnk.to/abonneer

In Supergaande Freestyle strijden Qucee, Nesim, Ta Joela en een gast om wie het creatiefste is met bars. De groep spelen om de kroon in twee rondes: Switch Up en Freestyle.

In Switch Up wordt er een kaart gepakt waarop de lyrics staan van een bekend nummer. Fraasie draait een beat waarop het nummer gebracht moet worden. De rest van de groep moet vervolgens raden om welke track het gaat.

In de final round gaat de groep in Freestyle op basis van een woord zolang mogelijk proberen rappen. De eerste die choked, is eruit.

-----------

snippet.title: GRAMMYs 2021: Harry Styles Sings Watermelon Sugar in ELECTRIFYING Performance
snippet.description:
Harry Styles can take a bow after his first award win and debut performance at the 63rd annual GRAMMY Awards, which aired on CBS. The 27-year-old singer won Best Pop Solo Performance for his song 'Watermelon Sugar,' which he performed live earlier in the broadcast. Harry's first GRAMMY win was met with applause from his fellow nominees, including Billie Eilish and Taylor Swift, who dated Harry in 2012.

#GRAMMYs2021

Exclusives from #ETonline :
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLQwITQ__CeH2Y_7g2xeiNDa0vQsROQQgv

snippet.title: An Afternoon with Prince Harry & James Corden
snippet.description:
Now that the Duke and Duchess of Sussex are settled into Southern California, James Corden thought it was time to show his friend Prince Harry the sights. From tea on an open top bus to visiting the "Fresh Prince of Bel Air" mansion, Prince Harry gets the tour he never dreamed of. Special thanks to Spartan for providing an incredible Spartan Race Obstacle Course to run. Learn more: spartan.com

Additionally, bandleader Reggie Watts and the house band provide original, improvised music throughout the show. Since Corden took the reigns as host in March 2015, he has quickly become known for generating buzzworthy viral videos, such as Carpool Karaoke."

snippet.title: Starship | SN10 | High-Altitude Flight Recap
snippet.description:
On March 3, Starship serial number 10 (SN10) completed SpaceX‚Äôs third high-altitude flight test of a Starship prototype as it successfully ascended, transitioned propellant, and reoriented itself for reentry and an active aerodynamic controlled descent. SN10‚Äôs Raptor engines reignited to perform the vehicle‚Äôs landing flip maneuver immediately before successfully touching down on the landing pad.

Test flights such as SN10‚Äôs are about improving our understanding and development of a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration interplanetary flights, and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.

snippet.title: Suzan & Freek - Goud (Offici√´le Video)
snippet.description:
Offici√´le video van Suzan & Freek - Goud
 
Download of stream: https://SuzanFreek.lnk.to/Goud 
 
Volg Suzan & Freek
Instagram - https://instagram.com/suzanenfreek
Tiktok - https://vm.tiktok.com/vNFXMD/ 
Facebook - https://facebook.com/suzanenfreek
Website - https://www.suzanenfreek.nl
 
Credits:
Creatieve directie: Roel Welling
Strategie: Ruben Cusell
Regie/camera: Dennis Lubbers
Showrunner: Rogier Sol
Productiemanager: Maaike Raat
Productieassistent: Senne HartsKeerl
Edit: Dennis Lubbers
Edit: Bj√∂rn Mentink
Grading: Dennis Lubbers 
 
 
Tekst:
 
Als je mijn gedachten eens kon zien
Dan stond ik niet alleen misschien
Ik heb eigenlijk nooit echt gedacht
Dat dit al het einde was
 
Zeg me, is het wederzijds
Als ik bang ben om alleen te zijn
Hield ik misschien te snel van jou
Ik dacht dat het werken zou
 
Ik had het ook niet zo bedacht, weet dat jij niet bij me past
Heb het zo vaak geprobeerd en ik wou dat het anders was
 Heb er zo hard in geloofd en ik weet jij deed dat ook
Toen kwam jij met de klap‚Ä¶ misschien is het beter zo
 
Maar we waren toch goud, zeg me wat als ik jou nooit vergeten kan
Nu ineens ben je weg, maar het voelt nog niet echt alsof ik dit kan
Denk je dat het makkelijk is ofzo
Je spookt door m'n hoofd omdat ik nog steeds in ons geloof
Maar we waren toch goud, zeg me wat als ik jou nooit vergeten kan
Wat als ik jou nooit vergeten kan
 
Zwijgen we de hele dag
Wil jij weer praten, hele nacht
Juist als ik denk dat we beter gaan
Zijn wij weer het huis met de lampen aan
 
Aan uit aan uit, we gaan ervoor
Zwart beeld, de stoppen slaan weer door
En al die tijd had ik nog hoop
We hadden het toch beloofd?

snippet.title: Making a Bond Car Top Gear Collab Part 1
snippet.description:
My name's Furze... Colin Furze haha. Project 00Furze is go with some Bond classics and added Furze/Top Gear gadgets.........Stay tuned for more Firepower and extra devices in the next video.

Make sure you check out the new series of Top Gear with Freddie, Paddy and Chris on BBC One, Sundays at 8pm - or on BBCiPlayer here http://bbc.in/38Tc3JN

And check out the Top Gear https://www.youtube.com/user/TopGear and James Bond https://www.youtube.com/user/jamesbond007 YouTube channels too!

Follow me on Social Media.
Instagram https://www.instagram.com/realcolinfurze/
Twitter https://twitter.com/colin_furze
Facebook https://www.facebook.com/Colin-furze-521680751253584
TikTok https://vm.tiktok.com/JJ8wSTs/

Music

First Track is some Music library James Bond like tune

Tune Over the Top Gear Jazz is called "Light Bulb" by "The Rival"
http://www.twitter.com/bobbyhalick
http://soundcloud.com/therivalmusic

3rd Track is called "Go Hard or Go Home" bu "Plot 32"
https://www.facebook.com/Plot32Band/

4th Track is Called "Run Hide" by "Bedside Manner"
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/artist/5EoKWFeVYyDFH3ehZVx7sg?si=2qwqRYBBT0KzI1ElQ5NQig
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCq6MGJ90VmBXLrBJbbANz-g
Instagram: https://instagram.com/bedsidemannersband?igshid=1awnqonpsx31w
Twitter: https://twitter.com/BedsideOfficial
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/bedsidemannersofficial/

5th Track is called "Honey Hold Back" by "St Peters Dream"
https://instagram.com/stpetersdream?igshid=1l8ya57f05sqo
https://m.facebook.com/stpetersdream

6th Track is Classical Handel by "Look Mum No Computer"
https://youtu.be/suFMi8VHopQ

7th Track is called "Mirrors" by "Wolfs"
https://www.facebook.com/wolfstheband/
https://www.instagram.com/wolfstheband/
https://wolfstheband.bandcamp.com/releases
https://soundcloud.com/wolfstheband

In a band? Want your music on my videos! Send your tracks to furzemail@yahoo.co.uk as all music on this channel is from viewers

#colinfurze #topgear #jamesbond

snippet.title: James Corden Recaps the GRAMMYs
snippet.description:
James Corden kicks off the show with a full recap of a huge night of the GRAMMYs, produced by his friend and Late Late Show executive producer, Ben Winston. After recapping everything from Harry Styles's suit to Beyonce's record-setting wins to Taylor's comfy A-frame cabin, James looks ahead to President Joe Biden's tour of the country.

More Late Late Show:
Subscribe: http://bit.ly/CordenYouTube
Watch Full Episodes: http://bit.ly/1ENyPw4
Facebook: http://on.fb.me/19PIHLC
Twitter: http://bit.ly/1Iv0q6k
Instagram: http://bit.ly/latelategram

Watch The Late Late Show with James Corden weeknights at 12:35 AM ET/11:35 PM CT. Only on CBS.

Get new episodes of shows you love across devices the next day, stream live TV, and watch full seasons of CBS fan favorites anytime, anywhere with CBS All Access. Try it free! http://bit.ly/1OQA29B

---
Each week night, THE LATE LATE SHOW with JAMES CORDEN throws the ultimate late night after party with a mix of celebrity guests, edgy musical acts, games and sketches. Corden differentiates his show by offering viewers a peek behind-the-scenes into the green room, bringing all of his guests out at once and lending his musical and acting talents to various sketches. Additionally, bandleader Reggie Watts and the house band provide original, improvised music throughout the show. Since Corden took the reigns as host in March 2015, he has quickly become known for generating buzzworthy viral videos, such as Carpool Karaoke."

Since Corden took the reigns as host in March 2015, he has quickly become known for generating buzzworthy viral videos, such as Carpool Karaoke."

snippet.title: Justin Bieber: Tiny Desk (Home) Concert
snippet.description:
More from NPR Music: 
Tiny Desk Concerts: https://www.npr.org/tinydesk‚Äã
Twitter: https://twitter.com/nprmusic‚Äã
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nprmusic

More from Justin Bieber:
"Peaches" Video: https://justinbieber.lnk.to/PeachesVid
Justice The Album Out Now: https://justinbieber.lnk.to/Justice  

The Tiny Desk is working from home for the foreseeable future. Introducing NPR Music's Tiny Desk (home) concerts, bringing you performances from across the country and the world. It's the same spirit ‚Äî stripped-down sets, an intimate setting ‚Äî just a different space.

Stephen Thompson | March 17, 2021
If you were to apply one of those "how it started / how it's going" memes to Tiny Desk (home) concerts ‚Äî which began, it turns out, almost exactly one year ago ‚Äî you'd have, under "how it's going," the image of pop superstar Justin Bieber as he and his band perform the world premiere of a new song called "Peaches."

"Peaches" will exist in a significantly different form when Bieber drops his new album Justice on Friday ‚Äî the track will feature guest vocals from GIVE≈åN and Daniel Caesar ‚Äî just as "Holy," another song from Justice, opens this set without the presence of guest Chance the Rapper. But Bieber's Tiny Desk set, performed with the aid of We the Band, provides the fullest taste yet (fully 25 percent!) of the singer's sixth album, whose singles have already been streamed hundreds of millions of times.

Bieber has had a massive month as he prepares for Justice to drop: March 2021 began with the singer's 27th birthday and recently produced his second career Grammy, as he took the prize for best country duo or group performance for "10,000 Hours" with Dan + Shay. It continues with this, his Tiny Desk debut. Friday, the next chapter officially begins.

SET LIST
"Holy"
"Peaches"
"Hold On"
"Anyone"

MUSICIANS
Justin Bieber: vocals, keys
Harv: bass
O'Neil "Doctor O" Palmer: keys
DJ Tay James: DJ
Robert Taylor: drums
Julian McGuire: guitar

CREDITS
Video: Nick Demoura, Mike Drew, Rory Kramer, Aaron Kroger, James Coker
Audio: Jim Ebdon, Dylan Ely, James Roach, Chris Houghton, Taylor Meyer
Production Manager: Chris Gratton
Camera Operators: Austin Wavra, Daniel Mardoyan, Noel Galan
Lighting Tech: Jim Mecsery

TINY DESK TEAM
Producer: Bobby Carter
Video Producers: Maia Stern, Morgan Noelle Smith
Audio Mastering: Josh Rogosin
Tiny Production Team: Bob Boilen, Kara Frame
Executive Producer: Lauren Onkey
Senior VP, Programming: Anya Grundmann

#justinbieber #tinydesk #nprmusic #pop #rnb

snippet.title: Giveon - Heartbreak Anniversary (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
"When It's All Said And Done...Take Time" available at: https://Giveon.lnk.to/WhenItsAllSaidAndDone_TakeTime
"Heartbreak Anniversary" Official Audio: https://youtu.be/nja_0BaQcNg

Follow Giveon:
Instagram:  https://www.instagram.com/giveon/?hl=en
Twitter:  https://twitter.com/giveon?lang=en
Facebook:  https://www.facebook.com/Giveonmusic/
Soundcloud:  https://soundcloud.com/giveon

Lyrics:
Ooh

Balloons are deflated
Guess they look lifeless like me
We miss you on your side of the bed, mmm
Still got your things here
And they stare at me like souvenirs
Don't wanna let you out my head

Just like the day that I met you, the day I thought forever
Said that you love me, but that'll last for never
It's cold outside like when you walked out my life
Why you walk out my life?

I get like this every time
On these days that feel like you and me
Heartbreak anniversary
'Cause I remember every time
On these days that feel like you and me
Heartbreak anniversary, do you ever think of me?
(Oh-ooh) No
(Ooh) No, no, no
(Ooh, ooh) Ooh, nah (Ooh)

I'm buildin' my hopes up
Like presents unopened to this day
I still see the messages you read, mmm
I'm foolishly patient (Foolishly patient)
Can't get past the taste of your lips (Taste of your lips)
Don't wanna let you out my head

Just like the day that I met you, the day I thought forever
Said that you love me but that'll last for never
It's cold outside like when you walked out my life
Why you walk out my life? (My life)

I get like this every time
On these days that feel like you and me
Heartbreak anniversary
'Cause I remember every time
On these days that feel like you and me
Heartbreak anniversary, do you ever think of me?
(Oh-ooh) Of me
(Ooh) 'Cause I think of you, think of you
(Ooh, ooh, ooh-ooh)

(C) 2021 Epic Records. With Not So Fast LLC.

#Giveon #HeartbreakAnniversary #WhenItsAllSaidAndDoneTakeTime

snippet.title: The Harry-Meghan-Oprah Interview Is All the Buzz
snippet.description:
James Corden kicks off the show recapping Oprah Winfey's interview with Prince Harry and Meghan, and James realizes the "wedding" he attended wasn't very official at all. And James gives us a handsy tutorial on how to milk a cow. After, Reggie Watts attempts to explain NFT art to James, who cannot pronounce "indistinguishable."

snippet.title: Squishy Makeovers:  Easter Edition
snippet.description:
Welcome to another episode of squishy makeovers, where I transform ugly, used, old, dirty, cheap or unwanted squishies (donated by my subscribers) into my own creations. I repair, paint and cut away for hours on end to complete these. Hopefully you like them. Get used to lots of rainbow and sprinkles, because I am addicted to both!

PRE-ORDER THE LIMITED EDITION RUBIK'S CUBE:
https://www.moriah-rubiks.com/

_________FAQs__________

1. CAN I SEND YOU SQUISHIES?
So many generous people have sent me their unwanted squishies so I actually have a lot to work on already, BUT if you desperately want to, you can request my mailing address in the email ALLLL the way at down in the description (sorry for the traveling), make sure to read the disclaimer down there as well.

2. ARE SQUISHIES RETURNED TO THE SENDERS AFTER THE MAKEOVER?
No. These squishies  are sent as donations to the series because they were damaged, and no longer wanted. Everyone has been informed in advance that squishies would not be returned. It would be waaay too complicated/expensive and massively time consuming to keep track of everyone and return each squishy. I'm just one person! 

3. WHAT PAINT DO YOU USE?
I use fabric paint. Fabric paint is meant to stretch, so it is perfect for squishing! Any brand will work fine, but I mainly use Tulip. You can find it at Michaels, Hobby Lobby, A.C. Moore, Walmart, Joann Fabrics, and Online.

5. WILL FABRIC PAINT CRACK?
The matte fabric paint is more likely to crack after lots of squishing. Slick fabric paints never crack. But there are benefits to both. I usually mix the two paints together to get the best of both worlds.

6. CAN I USE ACRYLIC PAINT ON SQUISHIES?
I would not recommend that. Acrylic paint will either make the squishy hard, or it will crack and flake off very easily. 



___________WELCOME TO MY CHANNEL__________

Hey! my name is Moriah (pronounced muh-rye-yuh üòÇ ) and this is my channel....obviously. I'm 26 and like doing anything creative...and being snarky.....just a lil. I make a lot of decorating, painting and general art videos here. I'm obsessed with editing and adding lil bits to my videos, so if that's not your thing....oof you may hate this haha. I paint on squishies, thrift store finds, and other random things I pick up. I also love to draw, but don't expect anything too skilled, I'm not the best at that haha. You will also find occasional crafting/testing crafting kits on my channel which are always a hot mess. And even some baking (REALLY bad at that, but it's fun to try LOL). 

CURRENT SERIES:
Squishy Makeovers: Fixing and decorating used squishies sent from my viewers
Thrift Store Makeovers: Fixing and decorating stuff I find at thrift stores/yard sales
Bake With ME: Recreating squishies I've decorated in real life
Create This Book: Drawing in the prompt book that I wrote (available to purchase and follow along)
Squishy Unboxing: Opening used squishy packages sent from viewers
Craft Kit Testing: pretty self explanatory. testing craft kits.

Find Products I Use (contains affiliate links):
https://a.co/4XDtrmV


___UPLOAD SCHEDULE___

Every Friday at 4:00pm ET: Alternating Squishy Makeovers, Thrift Makeovers, Craft Kit Reviews, Create This Book, Mail Openings and Miscellaneous crafts and DIYs


____PURCHASE ME PRODUCTS____

https://amzn.to/2vUerfI

____ME SOCIALS____

_____MAIL ME_____

For sending squishies, Letters, or general fan mail, please contact: FANMAIL@MORIAH.VIDEO to request my P.O. box address 
(must be 13+ to send mail)
ATTENTION: Unfortunately I can only respond to a small amount of people each week. This is to make sure that I get a reasonable amount of mail and can feature the maximum amount on camera. I apologize in advance if you do not hear back from me, I may not have even seen the message. This email gets SUPER clogged with thousands of messages. snippet.title: Starship | SN10 | High-Altitude Flight Test
snippet.description:
On Wednesday, March 3, Starship serial number (SN10) successfully completed SpaceX‚Äôs third high-altitude flight test of a Starship prototype from our site in Cameron County, Texas.

Similar to the high-altitude flight tests of Starship SN8 and SN9, SN10 was powered through ascent by three Raptor engines, each shutting down in sequence prior to the vehicle reaching apogee ‚Äì approximately 10 km in altitude. SN10 performed a propellant transition to the internal header tanks, which hold landing propellant, before reorienting itself for reentry and a controlled aerodynamic descent.
  
The Starship prototype descended under active aerodynamic control, accomplished by independent movement of two forward and two aft flaps on the vehicle. All four flaps were actuated by an onboard flight computer to control Starship‚Äôs attitude during flight and enabled a precise landing at the intended location. SN10‚Äôs Raptor engines reignited as the vehicle performed the landing flip maneuver immediately before successfully touching down on the landing pad! 

As if the flight test was not exciting enough, SN10 experienced a rapid unscheduled disassembly shortly after landing. These test flights are all about improving our understanding and development of a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration interplanetary flights, and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.

snippet.title: Tucker Carlson: Last Week Tonight with John Oliver (HBO)
snippet.description:
Tucker Carlson is admired by white nationalists, elected officials, and maybe some of your relatives or coworkers. Given that he has the ear of so many Americans, John Oliver explains where Tucker came from, what his rhetorical tactics are, and what he represents. 

Connect with Last Week Tonight online... 

Subscribe to the Last Week Tonight YouTube channel for more almost news as it almost happens: www.youtube.com/lastweektonight 

Find Last Week Tonight on Facebook like your mom would: www.facebook.com/lastweektonight 

Follow us on Twitter for news about jokes and jokes about news: www.twitter.com/lastweektonight 

Visit our official site for all that other stuff at once: www.hbo.com/lastweektonight

snippet.description:
Oprah made her TV return with Meghan and Harry in a riveting two hour interview about drama with the Royal Family, the reaction from the UK was fierce, the Senate passed President Biden‚Äôs $1.9 trillion COVID relief package, the CDC announced that those who have been fully vaccinated can gather indoors with smaller groups, Donald Trump doesn‚Äôt want the RNC and Republican committees using his name and likeness to raise money, Pope Francis visited the top Shi‚Äôite Cleric of Iraq to send a message of peace between the Catholic and Muslim worlds, it was fantasy suite night on ‚ÄúThe Bachelor‚Äù and love was in the air, and Jimmy chats with the editor of the conservative blog ‚ÄúThe Daily Rage‚Äù who is leading a protest against Space Jam‚Äôs new depiction of Lola Bunny.

snippet.title: La fabrique de l'ignorance | ARTE
snippet.description:
Comment, des ravages du tabac au d√©ni du changement climatique, on instrumentalise la science pour d√©mentir... la science. Une vertigineuse investigation dans les trous noirs de la recherche et de l'information.¬Ý¬Ý

Pourquoi a-t-il fallu des d√©cennies pour admettre officiellement que le tabac √©tait dangereux pour la sant√© ? Comment expliquer qu'une part importante de la population croie toujours que les activit√©s humaines sont sans cons√©quence sur le changement climatique ? Les pesticides n√©onicotino√Ødes sont-ils vraiment responsables de la surmortalit√© des abeilles ? Pourquoi la reconnaissance du bisph√©nol A comme perturbateur endocrinien n'a-t-elle motiv√© que de timides interdictions ? Au travers de ces "cas d'√©cole" qui, des laboratoires aux r√©seaux sociaux, r√©sultent tous de batailles planifi√©es √Ý coups de millions de dollars et d‚Äôeuros, cette enqu√™te √Ý cheval entre l'Europe et les √âtats-Unis d√©voile les contours d'une offensive m√©connue, pourtant lanc√©e d√®s les ann√©es 1950, quand la recherche r√©v√®le que le tabac constitue un facteur de cancer et d'accidents cardiovasculaires. Pour contrer une v√©rit√© d√©rangeante, car susceptible d'entra√Æner une r√©glementation accrue au prix de lourdes pertes financi√®res, l'industrie imagine alors en secret une forme particuli√®re de d√©sinformation, qui se g√©n√©ralise aujourd'hui : susciter, en finan√ßant, entre autres, abondamment des √©tudes scientifiques concurrentes, un √©pais nuage de doute qui alimente les controverses et √©gare les opinions publiques.

Agnotologie 
Cette instrumentalisation de la science √Ý des fins mensong√®res a g√©n√©r√© une nouvelle discipline de la recherche : l'agnotologie, litt√©ralement, science de la "production d'ignorance". Outre quelques-uns de ses repr√©sentants reconnus, dont l'historienne am√©ricaine des sciences Naomi Oreskes, cette investigation donne la parole √Ý des acteurs de premier plan du combat entre "bonne" et "mauvaise" science, dont les passionnants "d√©couvreurs" des m√©faits du bisph√©nol A. Elle expose ainsi les m√©canismes cach√©s qui contribuent √Ý retarder, parfois de plusieurs d√©cennies, des d√©cisions vitales, comme le trucage des protocoles, voire la fabrication ad hoc de rats transg√©niques pour garantir les r√©sultats souhait√©s. Elle explique enfin, au plus pr√®s de la recherche, pourquoi nos soci√©t√©s dites "de l'information" s'accommodent si bien de l'inertie collective qui, dans le doute, favorise le business as usual et la consommation sans frein.

La fabrique de l'ignorance 
Reportage de Franck Cuvelier et Pascal Vasselin (France, 2020, 1h37mn)
#cigarette #complot #5g

snippet.title: Prince Harry and Meghan Markle speak out
snippet.description:
In their first wide-ranging interview since leaving the royal family, Prince Harry and Meghan, Duchess of Sussex discuss that decision, plus bouts of depression, racism, family infighting and much more with Oprah Winfrey. Gayle King reports. Watch Oprah's full primetime special with Meghan and Prince Harry here: https://bit.ly/3t24kAK

---
Each weekday morning, "CBS This Morning" co-hosts Gayle King, Anthony Mason and Tony Dokoupil deliver two hours of original reporting, breaking news and top-level newsmaker interviews in an engaging and informative format that challenges the norm in network morning news programs. The broadcast has earned a prestigious Peabody Award, a Polk Award, four News & Documentary Emmys, three Daytime Emmys and the 2017 Edward R. Murrow Award for Best Newscast. The broadcast was also honored with an Alfred I. duPont-Columbia Award as part of CBS News division-wide coverage of the shootings at Sandy Hook Elementary School in Newtown, Connecticut. Check local listings for "CBS This Morning" broadcast times.

snippet.description:
Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 Ep 06 [Eng Sub] - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 19th Mar 21

Subscribe to our channel so you never miss any of your favorite dramas https://bit.ly/30JSSPr

Khuda Aur Mohabbat Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints

Farhad and Mahi hail from completely different economic and cultural backgrounds. Mahi, who comes from an influential family, must adhere to the conventions and requirements of her family‚Äôs class despite her true jovial nature. Farhad on the other hand belongs to a small town and is instantly drawn to the charismatic Mahi and soon forsakes everything for her.

Though Mahi appreciates Farhad‚Äôs efforts, she does not have the same feelings for him. In the quest to win Mahi‚Äôs heart, Farhad finds himself forming a special bond with his creator and becomes a devotee of love. In this classic love story two star-crossed souls struggle to fight for their love. Will destiny bring them together? Will the boundaries of class and society be broken? Or is Farhad destined to live the life of a devotee?

Written by: Hashim Nadeem Khan
Directed by: Syed Wajahat Hussain
Produced by: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi

Farhad on the other hand belongs to a small town and is instantly drawn to the charismatic Mahi and soon forsakes everything for her.

Though Mahi appreciates Farhad‚Äôs efforts, she does not have the same feelings for him. In the quest to win Mahi‚Äôs heart, Farhad finds himself forming a special bond with his creator and becomes a devotee of love. In this classic love story two star-crossed souls struggle to fight for their love. Will destiny bring them together? Will the boundaries of class and society be broken? Or is Farhad destined to live the life of a devotee?
